name: Sun Dried Tomato Pesto
recipeInstructions:
To make 2 cups of pesto:
1. Position the knife blade in the food processor bowl.
2. Add tomatoes and pulse 2 or 3 times, or until chopped.
3. Add Parmesan cheese and garlic cloves, then continue pulsing until smooth.
4. With the processor running, slowly pour warm olive oil through the feed tube until fully combined.
5. Use immediately, or store in an airtight container and refrigerate for up to 1 week. Serve over hot pasta.
Suggested uses for tomato pesto:
- Stir 1/4 cup pesto into one 8-oz carton of sour cream for an instant dip for vegetables.
- Try pesto as an omelet filling. Spoon about 2 tablespoons of the sauce over half of a three-egg omelet; fold the omelet and serve.
- Stir 3 tablespoons pesto into 1/2 cup softened unsalted butter. Serve the pesto butter as a bread spread, or toss it with hot vegetables.
